Package sample.nb.ant.zenoh

Class ZenohJavaPubAnt

java.lang.Object
sample.nb.ant.zenoh.ZenohJavaPubAnt
public class ZenohJavaPubAnt extends Object
Minimal command-line Zenoh publisher built on the pure-Java PureJavaZenohPublisher facade.

Connects to a Zenoh router over plain TCP, publishes a fixed number of short UTF-8 payloads to a single key expression at a configurable interval, then closes the session cleanly.

Positional arguments (all optional, in order):

  1. endpoint — Zenoh connect endpoint. Default tcp/localhost:7447. Accepts any scheme the facade supports (tcp/tls/ws/wss); this sample does not wire TLS credentials, so tls/wss will fail without extra config.
  2. key — publish key expression. Default demo/greeting.
  3. count — number of messages to publish. Default 5.
  4. interval — inter-message delay in milliseconds. Default 1000.

Pairs with ZenohJavaSubAnt for a quick end-to-end smoke test against a local zenohd.

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
      Program entry point.
      Parameters:
      args - positional CLI arguments; see class-level Javadoc for the endpoint / key / count / interval contract.
      Throws:
      Exception - any unhandled failure is allowed to propagate so the JVM prints a stack trace; the try/catch inside also prints and swallows so the throws is defensive only.
